"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "Identifies the core conceptual mismatch and proposes a well-supported reframing.",

  "RX.3": "Output stays strictly within the agreed scope.",

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the core conceptual mismatch and proposes a well-supported reframing.
rationale.R1.4: Points out the need for prior work comparison but doesn't fully map against multiple works.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively discloses uncertainties across multiple claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays strictly within the agreed scope.
rationale.RX.4: Successfully avoids harms and identifies potential issues in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major changes but lacks full traceability for minor edits.
